en.title: fancy title generator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a fancy title generator. I will type keywords via comma and you will reply with fancy titles. My first keywords are
en.remark: Generate multiple job titles and positions based on keywords.

related.title: Product Manager
related.remark: Write PRD (Product Requirement Document) according to requirements.

related.title: startup idea generator
related.remark: Write a business plan in markdown table format around the planning goals.

related.title: advertiser
related.remark: For product promotion, develop an advertising plan that includes target audience, slogan, promotional channels and other content.

metaDescription: Need a cool job title? Generate fancy positions based on keywords. Creative titles for modern roles and business cards. Try it now.

faq.q: The generated titles sound too fancy to actually use, what do I do?
faq.a: Append "titles must fit practical usage at medium-sized mainland Chinese companies, avoid Western-corporate styles like 'Chief Happiness Officer' or 'Disruptor.'" Without this the AI hands you trendy but unused titles. Localization is important.

faq.q: How do I get English titles for foreign companies?
faq.a: Say "give both Chinese and English versions, English following North American tech company title conventions." US VP / Director / Manager hierarchy differs significantly from Chinese companies. Without specifying, the AI gives mixed versions that feel off.
